title: Adiye Kolluthe Lyrics Vaaranam Aayiram
stanzas:
en kaalai neram
en maalai vaanam
nee indri kainthidudhey](2)

iravum pagalum un mugam
irayai pole
thurathuvadhum yeno

vadai kaatrinil oru naal
oru vaasam vanthadhey
un nesam endradhey
unthan kangalin yedho
minsaram ulladhey
en meedu paainthadhey..

mazhai kaalathil sariyum..
man tharai polave manamum
unai kandathum
sariya kandene

oru sol oru sol solladi
intha kaname
unnai manappene

sollaa vaarthaiyin sugame
mayil thogai polave
en meethu oorudhey

ella vaanamum neelam
sila neram maathiram
senthooram aagudhey

ennakkaagave vanthaai
en nizhal polave nindraai
unnai thotru nee
ennai vendraaye..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Adiye Kolluthe?

The song is sung by Benny Dayal, Krish, and Shruti Haasan.

Which movie features the song Adiye Kolluthe?

The song is from the Tamil movie Vaaranam Aayiram, released in 2008.

Who are the lead actors in Vaaranam Aayiram?

The lead roles in the movie are played by Suriya and Sameera Reddy.

What is the theme of the song Adiye Kolluthe?

The song portrays the passionate emotions of love and the intense connection between two individuals.

Who composed the music for Vaaranam Aayiram?

The music for the movie was composed by the renowned musician Harrish Jeyaraj.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Adiye Kolluthe from the 2008 Tamil movie Vaaranam Aayiram, directed by Gautham Vasudev Menon, features Suriya and Sameera Reddy in lead roles. Composed by Harrish Jeyaraj and sung by Benny Dayal, Krish, and Shruti Haasan, this romantic duet captures the essence of love and passion. The lyrics by Thamarai beautifully convey the emotions of a blossoming relationship. This melodious track is a favorite among fans for its heartfelt rendition and captivating music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the captivating charm of Adiye Kolluthe from the acclaimed movie Vaaranam Aayiram. This melodious track, composed by Harrish Jeyaraj and sung by Benny Dayal, Krish, and Shruti Haasan, beautifully captures the essence of love and passion. Dive into this musical masterpiece that perfectly complements the stellar performances of Suriya and Sameera Reddy.
stanzaMeanings: Adiye Kolluthe Song Lyrics Vaaranam Aayiram
I am being taken away, it’s beautiful, the world is spinning, and we are getting lost in each other.
Every moment spent with you brings meaning to my life.
My morning time, my evening sky, you are holding on to me.
Both night and day, your face shines like a divine light.
Is it necessary to feel lost after knowing the beginning and the end?
In the wind, one day, a home came, your love is what it is, something is shining in your eyes, it has touched me.
In the rainy season, everything is right, just like the earth, I have seen you clearly.
You are the peak of beauty, just a little push and you can walk.
Just say one word, this gaze is enough to make me think of you.
The words I speak are sweet, like a peacock's dance, they are all around me.
All the skies and lands, for a while, turn into a beautiful red.
You came for me, like my shadow, you are standing there, you need me.
